results.rendered_html:
upāram 1 P.
1 To sport, amuse oneself, delight in.
2 To cease, desist (from); dānapravṛtteranupāratānāṃ  R. 16. 3 ;  Ku. 3. 58 ; to rest, come to a stand-still; vātavarṣamupārataṃ  Rām.
